description_long: This is a mobile rectangular whiteboard with a smooth, glossy writing surface framed by a metallic border. The frame is constructed from what appears to be aluminum or steel, providing structural rigidity and a modern appearance. The whiteboard is supported by a sturdy base with two horizontal legs, each equipped with two caster wheels for easy mobility. The writing surface is large and uninterrupted, suitable for presentations or collaborative work in office or educational settings. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible accessories such as marker trays or eraser holders. The back of the whiteboard is identical to the front, and the side profile reveals the slimness of the board and the supporting frame.
description: A mobile, rectangular whiteboard with a metallic frame and four caster wheels, featuring a large, smooth writing surface and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full, unobstructed white writing surface and metallic frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the board and the two horizontal legs with visible caster wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the plain back panel and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the supporting legs with wheels.
